dailyIntentionSetTitle.desc: Title of the morning intention bottom-sheet when no intention has been set yet.

dailyIntentionEditTitle.desc: Title of the intention bottom-sheet when an intention already exists and can be edited.

dailyIntentionSubtitle.en: One small thing for your recovery today.
dailyIntentionSubtitle.desc: Subtitle prompting the user to write a small recovery intention for the day.

dailyIntentionHint.en: e.g. Call my sponsor before noon.
dailyIntentionHint.desc: Hint text inside the daily intention text field giving an example intention.

dailyIntentionSaveButton.desc: Button label to save the daily intention.

dailySaving.desc: Transient button label shown while a daily-practice entry is being saved.

dailyReviewTitle.desc: Title of the evening review pane asking the user to reflect on their intention.

dailyReviewPrompt.desc: Label introducing the intention the user wrote earlier in the day, shown above the quoted intention text.

dailyReviewDidIt.desc: Pill button: the user followed through on today's intention.

dailyReviewPartly.desc: Pill button: the user partly followed through on today's intention.

dailyReviewNotYet.desc: Pill button: the user has not yet followed through on today's intention.

dailyCapitalTitle.desc: Title of the weekly recovery-capital check bottom-sheet.

dailyCapitalConnected.desc: Checklist row label: did the user connect with a supportive person this week.

dailyCapitalPhysical.desc: Checklist row label: did the user move/exercise this week.

dailyCapitalSlept.desc: Checklist row label: did the user sleep enough most nights this week.

dailyCapitalHelpfulPlace.en: Spent time somewhere that helps me
dailyCapitalHelpfulPlace.desc: Checklist row label: did the user spend time in a place that supports recovery.

dailyCapitalMeaningful.desc: Checklist row label: did the user do something personally meaningful this week.

dailyCapitalNoteHint.desc: Hint text for the optional note field in the weekly recovery-capital check.

dailyCapitalSaveButton.desc: Button label to save the weekly recovery-capital check.
